name: 多发性硬化（MS）
summary: MS已有CD19 CAR-T两例人体证据、CT103A抗BCMA五例研究及多项Sponsor-initiated与IIT试验，但疾病进展获益仍待验证。
thesis: MS方向的价值不只取决于短期疾病活动下降，还取决于长期缓解、神经功能结局、B细胞重建和毒性鉴别能否形成一致证据链。
unmet_need: 难治或进展性患者仍缺少能够深度重置异常免疫记忆并带来持久缓解的治疗。
next_catalyst: KYV-101、MB-CART2019.1、TRX319等Sponsor-initiated研究与CT103A/RD06-05 IIT的长期EDSS、MRI、脑脊液和免疫重建数据。
key_questions: 深度B细胞清除能否转化为持久临床缓解
如何区分ICANS、原病波动与既往神经损伤
什么终点能够支持跨中心和注册导向比较
evidence_gaps: 样本量与对照证据有限
长期功能结局尚不充分
不同产品和预处理方案缺少可比框架

en.name: Multiple Sclerosis (MS)
en.summary: MS now has two-patient CD19 CAR-T evidence, a five-patient CT103A anti-BCMA series, and several sponsor-initiated and IIT studies, while benefit on disability progression remains unproven.
en.thesis: Value in MS depends not only on short-term disease-activity suppression, but on a coherent chain of durable remission, neurological outcomes, B-cell reconstitution, and toxicity attribution.
en.unmet_need: Patients with refractory or progressive disease still lack a therapy that deeply resets pathological immune memory and delivers durable remission.
en.next_catalyst: Long-term EDSS, MRI, CSF, and immune-reconstitution data from sponsor studies such as KYV-101, MB-CART2019.1, and TRX319, plus IIT programs including CT103A and RD06-05.
key_questions: Can deep B-cell depletion translate into durable clinical remission?
How should ICANS, disease fluctuation, and pre-existing neurological injury be separated?
Which endpoints can support cross-center and registration-oriented comparison?
evidence_gaps: Small samples and limited controlled evidence
Insufficient long-term functional outcomes
Limited comparability across products and conditioning regimens

name: 重症肌无力（MG）
summary: MG已形成从病例、IIT、随机Phase 2b到pivotal Phase 3的多层级证据，是神经免疫CAR-T中临床成熟度最高的适应症之一。
thesis: MG方向已形成两条关键性验证路径：重复给药mRNA CAR-T的安慰剂对照Phase 3，以及单次自体CD19 CAR-T对标准免疫抑制治疗的注册性Phase 3；关键是比较疗效持续性、安全性与执行复杂度。
unmet_need: 难治患者需要更稳定的疾病控制，同时降低长期免疫抑制和反复住院负担。
next_catalyst: Kyverna KYSA-6与Cartesian AURORA两项Phase 3的入组和读出，以及中国双靶点IIT的扩大样本与长期随访。
key_questions: 非持久表达是否足以重塑致病免疫反应
重复给药带来的执行成本是否可接受
与标准治疗相比应答深度和持续性如何
evidence_gaps: 长期随访仍不足
与持久型CAR-T缺少直接比较
患者分层和停药策略尚未稳定

en.name: Myasthenia Gravis (MG)
en.summary: MG has evidence spanning cases, IITs, a randomized Phase 2b study, and a pivotal Phase 3 trial, making it one of the most clinically mature neuroimmune CAR-T indications.
en.thesis: MG now has two pivotal paths: a placebo-controlled Phase 3 of repeat-dosed mRNA CAR-T and a registrational Phase 3 comparing single-dose autologous CD19 CAR-T with standard immunosuppression. Durability, safety, and operational complexity are the key comparisons.
en.unmet_need: Refractory patients need more stable disease control with less chronic immunosuppression and fewer hospitalizations.
en.next_catalyst: Enrollment and readouts from Kyverna's KYSA-6 and Cartesian's AURORA Phase 3 programs, plus larger and longer follow-up from Chinese dual-target IITs.
key_questions: Can transient CAR expression sufficiently reshape pathogenic immunity?
Is the operational burden of repeat dosing acceptable?
How deep and durable is response versus standard treatment?
evidence_gaps: Limited long-term follow-up
No direct comparison with persistent CAR-T
Patient stratification and withdrawal strategies remain unsettled

name: 系统性硬化症（SSc）
summary: 临床改善与蛋白组学整合让SSc成为机制解释较强的自免CAR-T方向。
thesis: SSc的关键在于把器官结局、功能改善和免疫重塑证据绑定，判断疗效是否超越自然波动与既往治疗影响。
unmet_need: 进展性患者面临不可逆器官损伤，现有治疗对疾病重塑能力有限。
next_catalyst: 更标准化的临床终点、长期器官结局与跨队列组学复现。
key_questions: 临床改善是否与免疫重塑同步且可重复
器官功能获益能否持续
单病种证据能否支持平台化扩展
evidence_gaps: 队列规模有限
组学信号需要外部验证
器官终点和随访时间不统一

en.name: Systemic Sclerosis (SSc)
en.summary: Integrated clinical and proteomic improvement makes SSc one of the more mechanistically interpretable autoimmune CAR-T indications.
en.thesis: Organ outcomes, functional improvement, and immune remodeling must be linked to determine whether benefit exceeds natural fluctuation and prior-treatment effects.
en.unmet_need: Progressive disease causes irreversible organ damage, while current therapies have limited disease-resetting capacity.
en.next_catalyst: Standardized endpoints, long-term organ outcomes, and replication of multi-omic findings across cohorts.
key_questions: Are clinical and immune-remodeling improvements synchronized and reproducible?
Can organ-function benefit persist?
Can single-disease evidence support platform expansion?
evidence_gaps: Limited cohort size
Multi-omic signals need external validation
Inconsistent organ endpoints and follow-up duration

name: 视神经脊髓炎谱系病（NMOSD）
summary: NMOSD已有CT103A抗BCMA CAR-T的12例Phase 1人体结果及配对脑脊液/血液单细胞机制研究，其他项目仍以早期篮式试验为主。
thesis: 现有证据支持CT103A可清除中枢与外周浆细胞谱系并产生短期无复发信号，但应以AQP4-IgG、年复发率、EDSS、MRI和长期免疫重建验证持续获益。
unmet_need: 复发可快速累积视力和脊髓功能损伤，难治患者仍需要更深、更持久且可预测的疾病控制。
next_catalyst: CT103A队列更长期复发与功能结局，以及HBI0101、QH103、C-CAR168等项目的NMOSD独立队列结果。
key_questions: NMOSD实际入组人数和AQP4-IgG分层是否充分
年复发率、EDSS与MRI改善能否形成一致证据
深度B细胞或浆细胞清除能否降低长期复发
evidence_gaps: 多数项目采用多病种篮式设计
尚缺NMOSD专属对照研究
长期复发和视力结局尚未披露

en.name: Neuromyelitis Optica Spectrum Disorder (NMOSD)
en.summary: NMOSD has a 12-patient CT103A anti-BCMA Phase 1 report and paired CSF/blood single-cell analysis; other programs remain early basket studies.
en.thesis: CT103A supports short-term relapse control and central/peripheral plasma-cell lineage depletion, but durability must be tested through AQP4-IgG, annualized relapse rate, EDSS, MRI, vision, and immune reconstitution.
en.unmet_need: Relapses can rapidly accumulate visual and spinal disability, leaving a need for deeper, durable, and predictable control in refractory disease.
en.next_catalyst: Longer CT103A relapse and functional follow-up plus NMOSD-specific results from HBI0101, QH103, C-CAR168, and other programs.
key_questions: Are NMOSD enrollment and AQP4-IgG stratification adequate?
Do relapse, EDSS, MRI, and visual outcomes align?
Can deep B-cell or plasma-cell depletion reduce long-term relapse?
evidence_gaps: Most programs use multi-disease basket designs
No NMOSD-specific controlled CAR-T study
Long-term relapse and visual outcomes remain limited

name: 自身免疫性脑炎（AE）
maturity: 人体病例、临床前验证与IIT
summary: 自身免疫性脑炎已有首例DAGLA抗体相关病例接受KYV-101的直接人体证据及约两年半延长随访；抗NMDAR方向另有抗原特异性CAAR-T临床前验证。
thesis: AE不能作为单一病种合并判断：神经元表面抗体、细胞内/副肿瘤抗体及胶质重叠谱系的致病机制、可逆性和CAR-T适用逻辑不同，必须按抗体、肿瘤背景与既存神经损伤分层。
unmet_need: 部分患者经激素、IVIG、血浆置换、利妥昔单抗或浆细胞治疗后仍复发，并遗留严重认知、精神、癫痫和运动功能负担。
next_catalyst: DAGLA病例更长期结构与功能随访、NMDAR-CAAR T进入人体研究，以及现有篮式IIT按NMDAR、LGI1、CASPR2等抗体披露独立结果。
key_questions: 不同抗体亚型的B细胞依赖性和神经损伤可逆性有何差异
免疫学缓解能否同步转化为CASE、mRS、认知和MRI获益
如何区分ICANS、原病活动、肿瘤相关过程与持续神经退行
evidence_gaps: 当前直接人体CAR-T证据仅1例DAGLA抗体相关脑炎
篮式IIT尚未按抗体亚型披露AE独立结果
NMDAR-CAAR T仍处临床前，LGI1/CASPR2等亚型缺直接证据

antibody_groups.logic: 抗体致病性通常更直接，广谱CD19/BCMA清除与抗原特异性CAAR-T均有明确机制基础。

items.phenotype: 精神行为异常、癫痫、运动障碍、自主神经不稳
items.evidence: NMDAR-CAAR T已完成体外与小鼠验证；尚无人体验证。

items.phenotype: 边缘性脑炎、面臂肌张力障碍发作、记忆障碍或周围神经高兴奋
items.evidence: 尚无抗体亚型专属CAR-T病例；篮式IIT未披露分层结果。

items.phenotype: 边缘性脑炎、难治性癫痫；部分亚型伴肿瘤
items.evidence: 缺乏直接CAR-T临床证据，必须同时评估肿瘤相关性。

items.phenotype: 脑病、惊跳/僵硬、腹泻体重下降或边缘性脑炎等异质表型
items.evidence: 未见专属CAR-T人体证据，适合单独登记而非合并判断。

antibody_groups.group: 细胞内或细胞内相关抗原
antibody_groups.logic: 抗体可能是疾病标志物而非唯一效应因子，T细胞介导损伤和既存神经退行性改变会限制单纯B细胞清除的可逆性。

items.phenotype: 小脑、认知和运动综合征
items.evidence: 已有1例KYV-101人体治疗及延长随访：炎症和抗体受控，但结构性神经退行仍进展。

items.phenotype: 边缘性脑炎、癫痫、僵人谱系或小脑共济失调
items.evidence: 其他GAD65神经综合征已有CAR-T个案，AE亚型仍缺直接证据。

items.antibody: Hu / Ma2 / CRMP5等副肿瘤抗体
items.phenotype: 边缘性或脑干脑炎，常伴肿瘤
items.evidence: 通常T细胞驱动更强；CAR-T收益不能由表面抗体型AE外推。

antibody_groups.logic: MOG-IgG、GFAP-IgG及多抗体重叠可表现为脑炎，但生物学与终点不同，应从经典神经元抗体AE中拆分。

items.phenotype: 脑膜脑炎、ADEM样表现、视神经脊髓或放射状血管周围病变
items.evidence: 部分CAR-T篮式研究纳入MOGAD；暂无可与经典AE合并计算的独立结果。

en.name: Autoimmune Encephalitis (AE)
en.maturity: Human case, preclinical validation, and IITs
en.summary: AE now has direct human evidence from the first anti-DAGLA case treated with KYV-101 and approximately 2.5 years of extended follow-up; NMDAR-specific CAAR-T also has preclinical validation.
en.thesis: AE cannot be assessed as one disease. Neuronal-surface antibodies, intracellular/paraneoplastic antibodies, and glial overlap syndromes differ in pathogenesis, reversibility, and CAR-T rationale and must be stratified by antibody, tumor context, and established injury.
en.unmet_need: Some patients relapse or retain severe cognitive, psychiatric, seizure, and motor disability despite steroids, IVIG, plasma exchange, rituximab, or plasma-cell therapy.
en.next_catalyst: Longer structural and functional follow-up of the DAGLA case, first-in-human NMDAR-CAAR T studies, and antibody-stratified results from current basket IITs.
key_questions: How do B-cell dependence and reversibility differ by antibody subtype?
Does immunological remission translate into CASE, mRS, cognitive, and MRI benefit?
How should ICANS, disease activity, tumor biology, and ongoing neurodegeneration be separated?
evidence_gaps: Direct human CAR-T evidence is limited to one anti-DAGLA case
Basket IITs have not reported antibody-stratified AE outcomes
NMDAR-CAAR T remains preclinical and LGI1/CASPR2 lack direct evidence

antibody_groups.logic: Antibody pathogenicity is generally more direct, supporting both broad CD19/BCMA depletion and antigen-specific CAAR-T strategies.

items.phenotype: Psychiatric symptoms, seizures, movement disorder, and autonomic instability
items.evidence: NMDAR-CAAR T is validated in vitro and in mice; no human evidence yet.

items.phenotype: Limbic encephalitis, faciobrachial dystonic seizures, memory loss, or peripheral nerve hyperexcitability
items.evidence: No antibody-specific CAR-T case; basket IITs have not reported subtype results.

items.phenotype: Limbic encephalitis and refractory seizures; some subtypes are tumor-associated
items.evidence: No direct CAR-T evidence; tumor association must be assessed in parallel.

items.phenotype: Heterogeneous encephalopathy, startle/rigidity, diarrhea-weight loss, or limbic syndromes
items.evidence: No subtype-specific human CAR-T evidence; these should be recorded separately.

antibody_groups.logic: Antibodies may be biomarkers rather than the sole effectors; T-cell injury and established neurodegeneration can limit reversibility after B-cell depletion.

items.evidence: One KYV-101 case plus extended follow-up: inflammation and antibodies remained controlled while structural neurodegeneration progressed.

items.phenotype: Limbic encephalitis, epilepsy, stiff-person spectrum, or cerebellar ataxia
items.evidence: CAR-T cases exist in other GAD65 neurological syndromes, but direct AE evidence is absent.

items.antibody: Hu / Ma2 / CRMP5 and other paraneoplastic antibodies
items.phenotype: Limbic or brainstem encephalitis, often tumor-associated
items.evidence: T-cell biology is often dominant; benefit cannot be extrapolated from surface-antibody AE.

antibody_groups.logic: MOG-IgG, GFAP-IgG, and multi-antibody overlap can present as encephalitis, but biology and endpoints differ from classic neuronal-antibody AE.

items.phenotype: Meningoencephalitis, ADEM-like disease, opticospinal disease, or radial perivascular lesions
items.evidence: Some basket CAR-T studies include MOGAD; no independent result should be pooled with classic AE.

name: 慢性炎性脱髓鞘性多发性神经病（CIDP）
summary: CIDP已有2例抗BCMA CAR-T病例研究，两例均实现早期无药缓解，但持续性出现分化。
thesis: CIDP的核心判断是深度浆细胞清除能否带来持久神经功能恢复，以及感染、B细胞再激活和自身抗体复现是否预测复发。
unmet_need: 部分患者对IVIG、激素、血浆置换和B细胞治疗反应不足或需要长期维持，仍持续累积运动与感觉功能损伤。
next_catalyst: CT103A病例扩大与长期随访，以及KITE-363、QH103和RD06-05等试验披露CIDP独立入组及INCAT结果。
keywords: 慢性炎性脱髓鞘性多发性神经病
key_questions: 无药缓解能否在更大样本中持续
感染后B细胞再激活是否可预测复发
INCAT、MRC、神经传导和患者功能能否同步改善
evidence_gaps: 当前正式临床证据仅2例
缺少对照组和标准化长期随访
CIDP亚型、自身抗体与疗效关系尚不清楚

en.name: Chronic Inflammatory Demyelinating Polyneuropathy (CIDP)
en.summary: CIDP has a two-patient anti-BCMA CAR-T report: both achieved early drug-free remission, but durability diverged.
en.thesis: The key question is whether deep plasma-cell depletion creates durable neurological recovery and whether infection, B-cell reactivation, and autoantibody return predict relapse.
en.unmet_need: Some patients remain refractory or maintenance-dependent despite IVIG, steroids, plasma exchange, and B-cell therapy, with continuing motor and sensory disability.
en.next_catalyst: Expanded CT103A follow-up and CIDP-specific enrollment and INCAT outcomes from KITE-363, QH103, RD06-05, and related studies.
key_questions: Can drug-free remission persist in larger cohorts?
Does infection-driven B-cell reactivation predict relapse?
Do INCAT, MRC, nerve conduction, and patient function improve together?
evidence_gaps: Formal clinical evidence currently covers only two patients
No comparator and limited standardized long-term follow-up
Relationships among CIDP subtype, autoantibody, and response remain unclear

name: 特发性炎性肌病（IIM）
summary: IIM已形成抗合成酶综合征、免疫介导坏死性肌病和皮肌炎等人体证据，并出现Cabaletta注册导向Phase 2/3、iCell中国Phase 1，以及Novartis、Cartesian随机Phase 2竞争格局。
thesis: IIM必须按DM、ASyS、IMNM及青少年IIM分层；应同时评价肌力、TIS、CK、皮肤、间质性肺病和激素停用，不能以单一酶学改善替代多器官获益。
unmet_need: 难治患者可持续出现肌无力、吞咽障碍、皮肤病变和进展性间质性肺病，且部分患者在B细胞重建后复发。
next_catalyst: RESET-Myositis Phase 2b/注册队列执行、iCell ICG318 Phase 1首批无药缓解与安全性数据，以及YTB323随机对照结果和Descartes-08无清淋重复给药研究启动/早期读出。
key_questions: 不同肌炎亚型能否获得一致且持久的多器官缓解
CD19后复发是否需要转向BCMA或双靶点清除
清淋型与无清淋重复给药路线的风险收益如何比较
evidence_gaps: 已发表证据仍以病例和小系列为主
多个历史报告来自重叠患者，不能重复计算独立样本
长期肺功能、复发、感染和免疫重建数据不足

en.name: Idiopathic Inflammatory Myopathy (IIM)
en.summary: IIM now has human evidence across antisynthetase syndrome, immune-mediated necrotizing myopathy, and dermatomyositis, alongside Cabaletta's registration-oriented Phase 2/3 program, iCell's China Phase 1 entry, and randomized Phase 2 programs from Novartis and Cartesian.
en.thesis: DM, ASyS, IMNM, and juvenile IIM must be stratified. Muscle strength, TIS, CK, skin disease, interstitial lung disease, and steroid withdrawal should be assessed together rather than substituting enzyme improvement for multi-organ benefit.
en.unmet_need: Refractory disease can cause persistent weakness, dysphagia, skin disease, and progressive interstitial lung disease, with some patients relapsing after B-cell reconstitution.
en.next_catalyst: Execution of RESET-Myositis Phase 2b/registrational cohorts, first drug-free-remission and safety data from iCell's ICG318 Phase 1, randomized YTB323 results, and launch and early readout of the lymphodepletion-free repeat-dose Descartes-08 study.
key_questions: Can different IIM subtypes achieve consistent, durable multi-organ remission?
Does relapse after CD19 depletion require BCMA or dual-target treatment?
How do conditioning-based and lymphodepletion-free repeat-dose approaches compare?
evidence_gaps: Published evidence remains dominated by cases and small series
Several historical reports contain overlapping patients and must not be double counted
Long-term lung, relapse, infection, and immune-reconstitution data remain limited

name: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）
maturity: 多队列人体证据与注册试验扩展
summary: SLE是当前自身免疫CAR-T证据最密集的病种之一，已覆盖自体、异体、双靶点、CAR-NK和体内CAR-T等多条路线。
thesis: SLE专题应把无药缓解、SLEDAI/BILAG、补体与自身抗体、肾脏病理、B细胞重建和感染风险放在同一条证据链上，避免仅凭短期血清学改善判断疾病重置。
unmet_need: 重症或难治性SLE及狼疮肾炎仍可出现反复器官损伤、长期激素暴露和多线免疫抑制失败。
next_catalyst: 更大样本前瞻性队列、狼疮肾炎器官结局、无预处理与现货型产品的首批人体数据，以及长期无药缓解和感染随访。
key_questions: 无药缓解能否在B细胞重建后持续
肾脏病理改善是否与全身疾病活动同步
自体、异体、双靶点和体内CAR-T的风险收益如何比较
evidence_gaps: 跨队列终点和随访时间仍不统一
儿童、肾脏和血液学亚型的可外推性有限
长期感染、生育和再次治疗策略数据不足

en.name: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE)
en.maturity: Multi-cohort human evidence and expanding registered trials
en.summary: SLE is one of the most evidence-dense autoimmune CAR-T indications, spanning autologous, allogeneic, dual-target, CAR-NK, and in vivo approaches.
en.thesis: Drug-free remission, SLEDAI/BILAG, complement and autoantibodies, renal pathology, B-cell reconstitution, and infection risk must be interpreted as one evidence chain rather than inferring immune reset from short-term serology alone.
en.unmet_need: Severe or refractory SLE and lupus nephritis can still cause recurrent organ damage, prolonged steroid exposure, and failure of multiple immunosuppressive lines.
en.next_catalyst: Larger prospective cohorts, organ outcomes in lupus nephritis, first human data from conditioning-free and off-the-shelf products, and long-term follow-up of drug-free remission and infections.
key_questions: Can drug-free remission persist after B-cell reconstitution?
Does renal pathology improve in parallel with systemic disease activity?
How do autologous, allogeneic, dual-target, and in vivo CAR-T approaches compare?
evidence_gaps: Endpoints and follow-up remain inconsistent across cohorts
Generalizability to pediatric, renal, and hematologic subtypes is limited
Long-term infection, fertility, and retreatment data remain insufficient

name: 自身免疫相关间质性肺病（AI-ILD）
maturity: 跨病种病例信号与肌炎试验
summary: AI-ILD目前的CAR-T信号主要来自抗合成酶综合征、IIM和系统性硬化症，独立的ILD专病证据仍然有限。
thesis: ILD不能只作为伴随症状记录；专题应独立追踪FVC、DLCO、HRCT、氧疗、激素减量、急性加重与感染，把肺部获益和原发自身免疫病活动分开评价。
unmet_need: 进展性纤维化、快速进展型ILD和多线免疫抑制失败可造成不可逆肺功能下降及高死亡风险。
next_catalyst: RESET-Myositis等研究的肺功能与HRCT分层结果，以及SSc和抗合成酶综合征队列的长期呼吸结局。
key_questions: 肺功能和影像改善能否独立于肌肉或皮肤应答持续
哪些ILD表型最可能从深度B细胞或浆细胞清除获益
如何区分感染、清淋毒性和原病急性加重
evidence_gaps: 缺少以ILD为主要入组和评价对象的CAR-T研究
现有病例肺部终点报告不一致
纤维化不可逆阶段与治疗窗口尚未明确

en.name: Autoimmune-associated Interstitial Lung Disease (AI-ILD)
en.maturity: Cross-disease case signals and myositis trials
en.summary: Current CAR-T signals in AI-ILD mainly come from antisynthetase syndrome, IIM, and systemic sclerosis; dedicated ILD evidence remains limited.
en.thesis: ILD should not be treated as a secondary symptom. FVC, DLCO, HRCT, oxygen use, steroid tapering, acute exacerbations, and infections need dedicated tracking, with pulmonary benefit separated from activity in the underlying autoimmune disease.
en.unmet_need: Progressive fibrosis, rapidly progressive ILD, and failure of multiple immunosuppressive lines can cause irreversible lung-function loss and high mortality.
en.next_catalyst: Stratified lung-function and HRCT results from studies such as RESET-Myositis, plus long-term respiratory outcomes in SSc and antisynthetase-syndrome cohorts.
key_questions: Can lung-function and imaging benefit persist independently of muscle or skin response?
Which ILD phenotypes are most likely to benefit from deep B-cell or plasma-cell depletion?
How should infection, conditioning toxicity, and disease exacerbation be separated?
evidence_gaps: No CAR-T study primarily enrolls and evaluates ILD
Pulmonary endpoints are inconsistently reported in current cases
The treatment window before irreversible fibrosis remains undefined

name: 类风湿关节炎（RA）
summary: RA已进入多个自身免疫CAR-T篮式试验和长期随访项目，但公开的RA独立疗效证据仍处于空白或极早期。
thesis: RA的情报价值首先取决于是否能在难治患者中实现可持续无药或低药疾病控制，并以DAS28、ACR应答、影像进展、功能和安全性证明其相对成熟治疗体系的增量价值。
unmet_need: 部分难治患者经历多种生物制剂和靶向合成药物后仍有持续炎症、结构损伤和功能下降。
next_catalyst: HBI0101、KN3601和CELL-ATTACK 1等篮式研究中RA队列的入组确认、首例安全性及独立疗效读出。
key_questions: RA是否需要与SLE不同的患者筛选和终点框架
深度免疫清除相对现有多线靶向治疗的增量价值是什么
无药缓解能否抵消清淋、感染和制造负担
evidence_gaps: 缺少公开的RA独立人体疗效数据
篮式试验中的RA样本量和分析计划尚不清晰
与成熟标准治疗的比较框架尚未建立

en.name: Rheumatoid Arthritis (RA)
en.summary: RA is included in several autoimmune CAR-T basket and long-term follow-up studies, but public RA-specific efficacy evidence remains absent or extremely early.
en.thesis: The first test is whether refractory RA can achieve durable drug-free or low-treatment disease control. DAS28, ACR response, imaging progression, function, and safety must demonstrate incremental value over a mature treatment landscape.
en.unmet_need: Some refractory patients retain active inflammation, structural damage, and functional decline after multiple biologic and targeted synthetic therapies.
en.next_catalyst: Confirmed RA enrollment, first-patient safety, and disease-specific efficacy readouts from HBI0101, KN3601, CELL-ATTACK 1, and related basket studies.
key_questions: Does RA require a different selection and endpoint framework from SLE?
What incremental value can deep immune depletion offer over existing targeted therapies?
Can drug-free remission offset conditioning, infection, and manufacturing burden?
evidence_gaps: No public RA-specific human efficacy dataset
RA sample sizes and analysis plans in basket trials remain unclear
No comparison framework against established standard therapy
